title: articlesFields
description:
Request available Articles data fields to be included in the response. Default is all fields. _fsymId_ and _articleId_ are always included.

Common Fields

|field|description| ||| |fsymId|Factset Regional Security Identifier| |articleId|Unique ID of the article assigned by Truvalue|

Articles Fields

|field|description| ||| |datePub|Publication date of the article expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format| |title|Title of the article| |source|Source of the article| |categories|categories assigned by Truvalue| |bullets|AI-generated bullet point summary for each article. Note, including bullets increases response size drastically| |author|Author of the article| |url|URL of the article| |language|Language code of the article| |orgName| Organization name assigned by Truvalue| |orgId| Unique identifier assigned by Truvalue that is applied on an organization level
